steps.title: Identify the determining factor
steps.content: The passage establishes that extinction duration directly determines the severity of the habitat problem—the longer a species has been extinct, the less likely suitable habitat remains.

steps.title: Find the longest extinction in the table
steps.content: The saber-toothed cat became extinct 11,000 years ago, the longest duration among all candidates in the table. The other choices either identify species extinct far more recently (passenger pigeon 1914, Caribbean monk seal 1952) or misstate the table's data about extinction dates (woolly mammoth at 6,400 years, not “several thousand years before” the cat's 11,000 years). That matches choice B — B is correct.
